name: Stale Instruction Trap
description: A stale instruction has higher confidence and appears more authoritative, but is actually superseded by a lower-confidence correction.

claims.subject: repo
claims.value: Use raw SQL with a thin query builder.

claims.subject: repo
claims.value: Use Drizzle ORM for type-safe queries.

queries.subject: repo
queries.expected_value: Use Drizzle ORM for type-safe queries.
queries.expected_previous_value: Use raw SQL with a thin query builder.
queries.explanation: The stale instruction (raw SQL, confidence 0.95) looks more certain than the current one (Drizzle ORM, confidence 0.70). A flat-memory agent would pick the stale instruction because it has higher confidence. Contrail picks the head of the supersession chain.
